executiveSummary.text: Cisco is a quality networking franchise executing a credible AI infrastructure transition. Q2 FY26 delivered record $15.3B revenue (+10% YoY) with $2.1B in AI orders and 21% networking revenue growth. The dilemma is valuation: at 30.75x P/E and within 3.4% of its 52-week high, the market is crediting the AI narrative without a meaningful margin of safety. Cisco is a solid compounder with strong free cash flow generation and a growing buyback, but the risk-reward for new money at $85 is no longer compelling. OPPORTUNISTIC BUY reflects the quality of the business and the AI tailwind, tempered by the lack of near-term upside to the 52-week high.
